args.subject: Action required: Start initial phase — deadline 2024-05-20
args.body:
Hi David,

Please coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the project. Deadline: 2024-05-20.

Please do the following:
- Confirm the timeline and next steps with the development lead.
- Assign tasks to the development team and share the initial task list and owners with me.
- Flag any blockers or resource needs immediately.

Reply to this email to confirm you’ve started and provide an estimated completion schedule.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action required: Send meeting agenda to John Mitchell — deadline 2024-05-21
args.body:
Hi Linda,

Please email the attached file meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review. Deadline: 2024-05-21.

When you send it, please CC me and reply here to confirm it was sent and include any feedback you receive.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action required: Review sales projections — deadline 2024-05-19
args.body:
Hi Mark,

Please review the sales projections and provide your feedback by 2024-05-19.

Specifically, please:
- Check the forecast numbers and assumptions.
- Note any discrepancies or concerns.
- Provide suggested changes or recommendations.

If useful, refer to the presentation file "presentation-slides-2024-05-20.pptx". Reply with your feedback or any questions.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
